name: Barbecued Bean Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients in a Crock-POT except for the barbecue sauce.
2. Cover and cook on Low heat setting for 10 to 16 hours.
3. Before serving, remove the beef short ribs and cut the meat from the bones.
4. Return the meat to the Crock-POT.
5. Stir in the barbecue sauce before serving.
From Rival Crock-Pot cookbook, date unknown
